brief_notes: Conveys the same core findings as the skill version with the key numerical results preserved in running text. However, the absence of structured tables for basecalling configurations, caller comparisons, depth recommendations, and computational resources makes the paper harder to navigate as a reference document. The methods section is adequate but compressed. The discussion is well-written and covers the practical implications. The paper would benefit from the organized tabular presentation of the comprehensive benchmark data that defines this type of study.
